user.description: Pick the Vitamix you'd like to add.

manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the Vitamix.

load_program.name: Load saved program
load_program.description: Arm one of the blender's saved program slots.

set_motor_speed.name: Set motor speed
set_motor_speed.description: Run the motor at a fixed Variable-speed (0..10).

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: 0..10 on the variable-speed dial. 0 stops the motor.

duration.name: Duration (seconds)
duration.description: u16 seconds; defaults to the run-forever sentinel.

start_motor.name: Start motor
start_motor.description: Start the motor; defaults to Variable-5.

stop_motor.name: Stop motor
stop_motor.description: Stop the motor (same wire packet as cancel).

play_melody.name: Play melody
play_melody.description: Sequence (speed, duration) notes for blender music.

gap.name: Gap between notes
gap.description: Optional silence between notes, in seconds.
